question.label: Upcoming projects
question.name: What are your initial thoughts about getting involved in the billing rewrite?
question.description: Gauges feelings about future responsibilities and potential contributions.

answer: Payments was real — I owned the migration plan and made the call on the dual-write window. I'm proud of how that went.

assessment.note: Expressed pride in owning the migration plan but didn't indicate a strong sense of clarity about the billing rewrite.

new_queue.label: Future clarity
new_queue.name: What would help you feel more prepared for the upcoming billing rewrite?

new_queue.label: Current blockers
new_queue.name: Are there any blockers on your current tasks that we should address?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
Payments was real — I owned the migration plan and made the call on the dual-write window. I'm proud of how that went.
Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.
